title: Authored "Cooldown" is silently codegen'd as a GameplayEffect *Period* (DoT tick), so cooldowns become periodic damage
Cross-tab spellbook search navigation never scrolls — the 250 ms scroll timer always loses to the 300 ms tab-exit animation
Search results for `Damage.*` tags route to the Tags tab with an `effects` section id that only exists on the Effects tab
/api/ability-spec POST persists unvalidated LLM-callback payloads; malformed effects crash downstream consumers later
C++ codegen emits invalid identifiers from free-text names — `FGameplayTag Ability_Frost Nova;` compiles nowhere
Search palette is a modal without dialog semantics, focus trap, or global Escape
Histogram tooltip floats in ~130px of dead space below the bars
Forge diff components hardcode zinc-* colors instead of the app's design tokens
Effects catalog controls are invisible to assistive tech: unlabeled icon-only pagination and stateless filter toggles
Long descriptive paragraphs set in uppercase + wide tracking, inconsistently across sibling sections
Player ability fallback bypasses both cooldown and mana gates — caster loadouts cast free, cooldown-less spells forever
API accepts unvalidated `scenario.enemies` — unbounded `count` hangs the server, all-unknown archetype ids return a silent 100%-survival result
Predictive-balance lets the player act every 0.1s tick — no cast time or global action slot, so its heatmap overstates player throughput ~2×
Pipeline-node expansion (C++ references) is mouse-only — invisible to keyboard and screen-reader users
Combo timeline remove button is invisible until hover and has no accessible name
Combo time ruler doesn't line up with the blocks it measures
DirectHealthFlow nodes advertise expansion (caret + pointer cursor) but clicking does nothing
Gear select has no programmatic label — the one unlabeled control in the scenario form
"Hardened" codegen emits invalid C++ float literals — every preset genome's .cpp fails to compile
Clearing the genome name silently deletes the genome (and all its checkpoints) on next reload
Wizard marks a step "running" before a cancellable dispatch — preflight Cancel leaves an eternal spinner
Attribute Optimizer: lowering the level keeps the old allocation — efficiency badge reads >100%
Clipboard copies report success without verifying the write
Code preview modal is keyboard-inaccessible: no Escape, no close button, no dialog semantics
All custom sliders are invisible, unlabeled range inputs — 40+ unnamed focusable controls
Level-slider row duplicated across panels and already drifting (NumberField vs raw input, Lv.100 vs Lv.50)
Genome title input has no placeholder, label, or empty-state affordance — it can vanish entirely
Selected state on wizard source cards and compare toggles is color-only, with no aria-pressed
Config clamp fix only covers `simulate` — `generate-code` and the entire `/sweep` route still feed raw client configs into `runSimulation`
Tornado chart relabels stale sweep data when the output metric is toggled — gini values displayed as "Net Flow /hr"
Saving a run with an existing name silently overwrites it — including the baseline snapshot
`buildSupplyDemand` divides cohort earnings by the total agent count — affordability index inflated for every level past the early game
"Download All" fires 7 synchronous programmatic downloads — browsers block all but the first, and the blob URL is revoked while the download may still be starting
All four economy charts are hover-only — zero keyboard or screen-reader access to the simulation's core output
Chart hover-tooltip JSX copy-pasted 4× with drifting styles — and the Gold Flow variant overflows the card edge
Saved-run delete is one un-confirmed click sitting 12 px from the load/baseline buttons
Collapsible section headers lack `aria-expanded`, and the CodeGen title row invisibly changes function from "expand" to "trigger network call"
Save-run input relies on placeholder-as-label and gives no inline failure feedback
Selecting another item card mid-generation fires a premature/false completion and orphans the real one
AffixSunburst outer-ring labels index the wrong arcs — "2 Prefixes" is unlabeled and a grandchild label renders in its place
"Sort: Power" orders the grid by a different power formula than the PWR badge shown on every card
Comparison panel allows the same item in two of three slots — duplicate React keys and a self-comparison
Keyboard users can navigate the item grid but cannot open the item detail drawer
Equipment loadout paper-doll slots are mouse-only
Filter and form controls have no accessible names
Affix-table collapse button suppresses the focus outline and hides its expanded state
Select/input pill styling is copy-pasted across three files and has already drifted
Pagination Prev/Next operate on the unclamped stale `page` — dead clicks after deletions shrink the page count
Auto-balancer conflates "degenerate lerp" (denom = 0) with "dropChance 0" — reports false reachable/unreachable verdicts
Auto-balancer silently fabricates a distribution when `rarityWeights` is shorter than 5
`setEditorHistory` called inside `setEditorEntries` updaters — StrictMode double-invoke pushes duplicate undo snapshots
Slider-drag undo coalescing never ends — two separate drags of the same slider collapse into one undo step
Pagination chevron buttons are unlabeled icon-only controls with no hover/focus affordance
Filter toggles (source, rarity, breadcrumb) convey active state by color alone — no `aria-pressed`/`aria-current`
Search input and enemy-source select have no programmatic labels
The "2xs mono pill button" is hand-rolled ten-plus times with drifting hover/disabled treatments — extract a shared component
Empty entry list always blames "your search" — misleading when the table is actually empty
Balance linter crashes on the exact malformed archetype it exists to flag (half-applied stats guard)
Perception cone visualizer draws the 800cm hearing ring at ~1180cm scale, overstating hearing range by ~47%
BT flowchart collapse toggles silently corrupt base collapse state while a search is active
Behavior-tree widget puts every node in the tab order and hides hierarchy from assistive tech
Hand-rolled eyebrow-label string duplicated 32 times across the bestiary instead of the MicroLabel primitive
Perception cone panel doesn't stack on narrow viewports, crushing the legend
Builder preview's effective stat value renders at 10px, below the module's documented 12px floor
BT node search has no empty state — zero matches renders a blank tree pane
Boss zone diamonds are drawn in pixel space while every other map element uses percentages
Level Range Flow axis frozen at MAX_LEVEL=7 while zones now reach level 50 — six zones render empty or clipped bars
Moving the player-level slider during a zone generation run re-keys the CLI hook and silently drops the completion refresh
Zone pins persist unvalidated `params` — one malformed POST creates a poison pin that crashes the generator panel on every restore
Requesting a nonexistent levelDocId silently generates fallback quests instead of erroring
Topology graph nodes overflow the hard-coded 460×300 canvas and their tooltips detach
World map and topology graph are mouse-only; the player-level slider has no accessible name
Enemy Density Heatmap renders the five KOTOR zones as confident all-zero rows
Range-filter logic and the labelled-bar row are copy-pasted across three panels
Region Details uses AnimatePresence mode="sync", causing a stacked layout jump on every zone switch
Build comparison table hardcodes 3 preset columns while BUILD_PRESETS ships 5
Cloud sync "Last Sync" renders timezone-dependent time-of-day — hydration mismatch and stale syncs masquerade as fresh
Diminishing-returns axis labels don't match the plotted coordinate scale (~11% read error)
Data Recovery wizard steps are mouse-only clickable divs — keyboard users can't operate them
Selected-state toggle buttons are inconsistent: aria-pressed on one panel, color-only everywhere else
Compare-mode layouts have no mobile breakpoints, unlike every sibling grid
XP source rows print every label and percentage twice
Budget bar's "80%" tick label is positioned with a margin hack and drifts off its marker
Non-identifier state names (spaces, empty, leading digit) pass the linter clean and silently generate uncompilable C++
Setup Guide completion is written to the persisted store but read from ephemeral local state — progress visually resets to 0/6 on remount
MixamoImport watched-folder default is frozen at mount — project switch (or late store hydration) dispatches the pipeline against the wrong project
Combo code "Copy" shows "Copied!" even when the clipboard write fails (and leaks an unhandled rejection)
"Entry" indicator labels an arbitrary state as the entry point in scanned/bridge mode
StateMachineEditor canvas nodes are mouse-only divs — selecting states and completing a "Draw Arrow" is impossible from the keyboard
Editor header toolbar (8 buttons) has no wrap or collapse — actions clip off-screen at narrow widths
Animation panels hand-roll their chrome with hard-coded hex colors instead of SchematicPanel/design tokens
Async results (Blender exports, scan errors) render silently — no `role="status"`/aria-live and no dismiss
Hover-only transition rule labels use a fixed 8%-wide rect — long rules overflow the badge and are unreachable on touch/keyboard
Fresh-mount Material Configurator generates a "Metal" material with Metallic=0
Style-transfer "Analyze" never looks at the image — image-only analyses return hardcoded stone/gray defaults presented as extracted properties
Concurrent Blender previews on two patterns cross-wire spinner and result state
Applying a preset silently discards the user's custom effect ordering
Two clashing visual languages inside the Materials tab strip
Configurator surface/output/feature selectors expose no selected state to assistive tech
Configurator and style-transfer range sliders are unlabeled with no visible thumb/focus state
Style-transfer "Compare" toggle is a dead end for description-only analyses
Post-Process Studio layout breaks down at narrow widths (fixed 7-column presets, non-wrapping toolbar, rigid 3-column grid)
Single transient status-poll failure permanently fails an in-flight MCP job and orphans the remote generation
Cancelling a pending MCP job during submission spawns an unregistered poller that can import the cancelled model
Generated UE5 skeletal-mesh import script writes scale/LOD to StaticMeshImportData — user's scale silently ignored
Uncommitted transparency drift-fix breaks its own unit test (verified red)
Cleanup fetch in generateTextureOn3DModel's finally block can mask the real error
Reference-image upload is unreachable by keyboard (display:none file input)
Asset-forge controls skip the cluster's standardized focus ring and aria-pressed treatment
Browse search failures are silent — stale results masquerade as fresh, and zero-hit searches show the wrong copy
Disabled Generate button never says why
Segmented-toggle and status-pill JSX is hand-copied across the visual-gen cluster
Command chain from cbb5840 has no flush on disconnect — dead commands starve the queue and reconnects stall behind them
Serialization does not drain stale bytes after a timeout — late response answers the next command, permanently off-by-one
Manual connect during auto-retry backoff doesn't cancel the pending retry — the stale retry clobbers a successful connection
ModelsView still uses the raw 150ms dispatch timer instead of dispatchPromptWhenReady — prompts silently dropped
Asset-import auto-capture revokes/shifts the screenshot the user is currently viewing
Lightbox dialog has no focus management — focus stays behind the modal
Asset cards expand only via mouse — the dependency graph is unreachable by keyboard
Sort controls were built but never rendered — the inventory is locked to name-ascending
A failed rescan replaces the entire inventory with a full-screen error
Expanded-card chrome hardcodes raw palette colors and one-off typography against the app's token system
Circular zones (and their attenuation glows) silently swallow emitter placement and zone drawing
Event Catalog edits are silently wiped on every tab switch
The first zone in every scene gets `var(--text-muted)` as its color — hex-opacity concat renders it black/unstyled
CLI completion stamps `lastGeneratedAt` on whichever scene is active when the run finishes
Deleting assets/sets removes DB rows only — files leak forever and failures are swallowed
Scene delete is one-click, irreversible, and unconfirmed
10-tab bar has no overflow handling or tablist semantics, unlike every other module's tab bar
Event Catalog rows are mouse-only — keyboard users cannot edit or delete events
Copy button nested inside the expand button in generated-file rows (invalid interactive nesting)
Event Catalog is visually off-scale from every sibling audio tab
Scenario-only L3 jobs reach the bridge executor, which runs an *unfiltered* automation pass and correlates against ALL recorded results
catalogStore persist `merge` shadows whole catalogs — newly-seeded entities in an existing catalog never appear, and their server lifecycle rows are silently dropped
Drain-worker singleton state evaporates on dev recompile — an orphaned, unstoppable `setInterval` keeps driving the non-reentrant editor alongside any new worker
Running deferred gates gives zero outcome feedback — the DrainSummary is discarded and failures are silent
The runner's failure detail can never appear in the pipeline-rail tooltip — `deriveEntityArtifacts` drops `reason` (and the server tier), leaving dead tooltip code
CatalogMatrix blocker tooltip shows a stale "not yet run" reason for gates the runner actually ran and failed
CatalogMatrix renders every cell as "pending" while artifacts load (and after a failed fetch) — loading/error states are presented as real data
NextStepCoach wraps interactive controls in a `role="status"` aria-live region
"Populate demo" silently destroys the entire kept generation history — locally and on the server
Double-click on Generate now appends duplicate batches and silently moves the selection (residue of the 3d50330 fix)
Out-of-band economy values render off-chart: the OUTLIER diamond vanishes and budget bars bleed past their track
CliProduce's "✓ written…" success banner survives Reset, contradicting the wiped store
Batch timestamps display UTC as if it were local wall-clock time
LabTextarea / LabInput remove the focus outline with no replacement — keyboard users lose their place in every Produce panel
CandidateGallery uses 13px type in five places, breaking the module's documented 14px floor
ItemVFX hand-rolls its GPU budget bar instead of using ChartPanel, and it overflows past 100% exactly when over budget
"view prompt" disclosure toggles expose no expanded state to assistive tech
Acceptance banner labels power with a spurious "%" — "power 102%" is a score, not a percentage
ArchetypeStep's gallery `generate`/`reselect` still has the stale-closure batch-drop that 3d50330 fixed only in ItemArt
Items step lists diverge between Baseline and the registry — matrix jumps open the wrong step and matrix statuses lie for `items`
One-shot toast "Open" navigation is silently swallowed unless the Catalogs view is active
`runDrain` discards the drain outcome — a failed/offline drain ends with zero feedback
The canonical Produce form is invisible to keyboard and screen-reader users at three points
CatalogTree's `role="tree"` is structurally invalid and entities are outside the keyboard model
The lab header never adapts below desktop widths while the body collapses at 1100px
Category headers' bottom separator is silently erased by a shorthand override
Draft entities are listed under a catalog whose count excludes them
Whole-word fix killed multi-word trigger keywords — anti-pattern guardrail silently dead for several approaches
Imported real-project crash logs invert game/engine frame detection and blame the AI module via `KERNELBASE!RaiseException`
Clearing search/filters leaves stale filtered patterns, and the Sort dropdown is inert in the default view
Anti-pattern pre-dispatch check ships the full enriched prompt in a GET query string — large prompts 431 and the catch swallows it
Crash list rows and crash pattern cards are mouse-only clickable divs — keyboard users cannot open anything
PatternLibraryView double-pads and nests a second scroll region inside the evaluator tab container
Three hand-rolled icon-select dropdowns beg for extraction; sibling search inputs disagree on radius and focus treatment
Author Pattern modal can only file patterns under modules that already have patterns
Import panel feedback: stale success message survives a failed import, and the failure renders far away at the top of the page
Pattern miner stamps the module-wide success rate onto every approach cluster, corrupting confidence and "switch to it" advice
Stale persisted checklist item IDs count as completed — completion can exceed 100% and inflate health, milestones, and velocity
fetchHealth has no request sequencing — the crash-enriched refresh can lose the race to the stale first fetch
Health dashboard fabricates "healthy" status for subsystems that have never run
/api/weekly-digest bypasses the error envelope — any DB failure surfaces as a cryptic JSON parse error
"Scan Project" is a dead primary CTA — styled, enabled, and wired to nothing
Radar module drill-down is mouse-only; icon-only dismiss buttons are unlabeled
Hand-rolled PRIORITY_COLORS diverges from SEVERITY_TOKENS — and its 'low' entry is invalid CSS
ModuleHeatCell advertises interactivity (hover ring) but does nothing when clicked
Six bespoke mini-chart implementations; LineChartSimple's gridlines misrepresent the scale
Compliance report is never invalidated — stale scores survive project switches and pre-hydration audits
Re-audit and Resolve failures are invisible once a report exists
Quality star meter still uses unclamped `.repeat()` — the wave-1 clamp was only applied to room difficulty
The roadmap "Feature Implementation Trend" chart is syntactically invalid Mermaid and never renders
Deployment "Avg Duration" is a pairwise rolling halving, not an average — and cancelled builds deflate the success rate
Error-red is used as the compliance view's accent color — loading, primary action, and selection all read as failures
Resolve button mixes accent backgrounds with success-green text and has no in-flight state
The accent button recipe is duplicated 5× with drift — including missing disabled styling on two export buttons
Export and Copy failures give zero feedback
TOC highlight never follows scrolling — `aria-current` sticks to the last clicked section
Batch-review "Abort" (and the 10-min timeout) never kills the underlying CLI execution
BatchReviewPanel polling interval is never (re)created on mount/resume — progress freezes and the recovery path is swallowed
A *completed* scan with errored passes wipes the module's baseline and fabricates "Resolved" findings
Progress grid renders 7 cells per row in a `grid-cols-6` grid — every status row shifts one column
category: wrong-display (regression from adding the ground-truth pass)

title: "Improved" feature status is excluded from Overall Progress and all completion bars
"Needs Attention" and "Stale Reviews" rows are mouse-only clickable divs
Disclosure and toggle controls expose no expanded/pressed state to assistive tech
Hardcoded hex colors bypass the status-token system; selection ring uses error-red
The accent "pill button" is duplicated 6+ times with three different alpha schemes
Stale-threshold input snaps to 7 while typing and ignores its own max
Test-run / Auto-detect CLI round-trip never closes — scenario statuses, lastRunOutput, and the pass-rate ring are permanently dead
All AI-testing mutations fail silently — inputs are cleared optimistically and no error ever reaches the UI
PUT update-scenario accepts non-array `stimuli`/`expectedActions` — one malformed request persistently bricks the sandbox view
"Copy CSV" string-table export does not escape quotes or newlines — silently malformed UE5 import once real strings flow through
Sandbox editing surface is invisible to assistive tech — icon-only buttons and placeholder-only inputs have no accessible names
One-click, cascade suite deletion with no confirmation or undo
Both toolbar buttons spin for any background activity — user can't tell whether tests are running or being generated
Hand-rolled accent chip/button styling repeated 8+ times with inconsistent opacity tokens
Search text bleeds between Strings and Translations tabs, and filtered-to-zero lists render blank space
Aborting a cook kills only the `cmd.exe` wrapper — the UAT tree is orphaned and the run is recorded as `failed`
`getSizeTrend` returns the *oldest* N rows — the size trend chart freezes once history exceeds the limit
SmokeTest's remount key is the exe path, which is identical for every cook of the same profile — second run shows a stale verdict with no running indicator
Real pipeline builds never receive a version — auto-increment only fires on hand-entered records
No mutual exclusion between interactive and scheduled cooks — two UATs can stage into the same directory concurrently
Icon-only refresh button has no accessible name and sortable headers expose no sort state
Expandable rows and preflight tiles don't expose expanded state; no-op tiles still present as clickable buttons
Build History flashes "No builds recorded yet" on every load before data arrives
Build deletion is a single click, irreversible, with no confirmation or undo
Record Build form: labels aren't associated with inputs and numeric fields silently mis-parse
Enter key bypasses the in-flight guard — duplicate test suites on double/held Enter
Failed suite creation silently wipes the user's input — mutate swallows the error, handler clears anyway
Pillar cover model uses `w` as block radius but renders it as diameter — "covered" points float in open ground
Copy-to-clipboard failure is an unhandled rejection — user pastes stale clipboard contents into UE5
Suite deletion is instant, unconfirmed, and irreversible — one misclick destroys all scenarios
Drag-to-rotate forward vector is pointer-only — keyboard and AT users cannot drive the core control
Drag releases the moment the cursor exits the SVG — no pointer capture on the shared drag hook
Squad member hover tooltip clips off the canvas — missing the side-flip its sibling visualizers use
Create-suite form rendered twice and bound to the same state — typing mirrors across two visible inputs
"+" new-terminal tab creates a session that can never be displayed anywhere
Renaming a project rewrites `projectPath` to a directory that does not exist
Out-of-order search responses overwrite newer results (no request sequencing)
Selecting a "Category" search result silently does nothing
FTS5 highlight markers collide with literal "→" arrows in indexed content
CLI tab close "X" is a fake nested button — unreachable by keyboard
The shell's three overlay surfaces each do dialog semantics differently (none fully correct)
Activity feed shows raw module ids instead of human labels
Search trigger shows mac "⌘K" on Windows while its tooltip says "Ctrl+K"
Shared chrome bypasses the color-token system with one-off hex/Tailwind palette values
Auto-Verify's batch write can never persist (partial payload vs. full-upsert binding), so after commit 2dd1e06 the whole feature is silently dead while the UI claims "N statuses updated"
One transient GET failure on mount triggers auto-seed, which overwrites a module's entire review data with `unknown`/empty
`/api/checklist/complete` accepts arbitrary moduleId/itemId, so a single mistyped CLI curl pushes module progress past 100% and falsely unlocks prerequisite gates
NBA reports 50% success probability for modules whose every attempt failed (`moduleSuccessRate || 0.5` falsy-zero)
Row action buttons (Review / Copy / View files) are keyboard- and screen-reader-hostile: interactive spans nested inside the row button, hover-only reveal, no visible focus
The "Grouped" view toggle is a dead button whenever a non-default sort is active — the auto-switch effect instantly reverts it
Sticky category headers hide under the filter bar when it wraps — hardcoded `top-[40px]` breaks at narrow widths
Filter feedback is inconsistent: status-chip filtering shows no "Showing X of Y" count, and the no-match empty state offers no one-click reset
Quality range min/max selects have no accessible labels and icon-only controls rely on `title` alone
Every live run completes with a null task id, so `session.isRunning` latches true forever after the first prompt
Abort still doesn't stop the run on Windows — `process.kill()` only terminates the `cmd.exe` shell, not the claude node process (regression gap in the a5a5795 fix)
Abort during the connecting window doesn't latch — the POST resolution revives the "aborted" run and the DELETE targets a stale executionId
Hiding and re-showing a streaming terminal replays the full event history — duplicated transcript and doubled `assistantOutputRef`
Dispatched task prompts are silently dropped when the terminal is mid-stream — the task evaporates with a registered callback leaked
Assistant replies are hard-truncated at 200 characters with no way to expand them
Inline terminal resize handle is mouse-only — no keyboard, touch, or separator semantics
Streaming output and disclosure rows are invisible to screen readers — no live region, no `aria-expanded`
Disabled send button is visually identical to enabled, and its hover state hardcodes `blue-500` outside the token system
Three different accent colors compete inside one terminal — session accent, `MODULE_COLORS.core`, and `MODULE_COLORS.setup`
Persisted A/B tests are unreachable after a page reload — the UI has no way to list them
Module picker offers 5 phantom modules and hides 5 real ones — registry drift
One transient action error permanently blanks every tab in the view
Optimizer records phantom diffs when a pass doesn't actually change the prompt
`shorten` mutation deletes every parenthetical — gutting UE5 macro specifiers and function arguments
Disclosure buttons and icon-only actions are invisible to keyboard and screen-reader users
Starting an A/B test gives zero feedback and invites duplicate submissions
Variant "Copy" button is fire-and-forget — no confirmation, no failure handling
Three competing spinner implementations — one nearly invisible on its button
"New Variant" button silently no-ops when no module is selected
Room codegen builds C++ class names from raw room names — only whitespace is stripped
Screen/zone enum identifiers can collide, go empty, or start with a digit
`getEnginePath` hardcodes the Launcher install path while its docstring claims source-build support
Inventory prompt emits dangling empty bullets for disabled interactions
"Try again" after a failed refinement silently regenerates from scratch — and the instruction is already gone
Prompt Inspector's missing-required vs missing-optional chips differ only by color
ForgeErrorCard's status icon doesn't get the card's tone color
Refine input has no accessible label
Project switch never re-scans: stale checklist drives a destructive "Create project" CTA against an existing project
"Start Fresh" hardcodes another user's home directory as the default projects path
baffff5 merge regression: `project_progress` rows are now append-only — fresh setup at a reused path resurrects the old checklist forever
Pending debounced autosave fires across a project switch and merges the old project's checklist into the new project's row
The wizard offers no manual browse / path-entry fallback — undetectable projects simply cannot be opened
Detection failure is rendered as a confident "No projects found" — silent error with no retry on the first screen
Wizard selection states are color-only and carry no semantics for assistive tech
Hot-patch pipeline visualization never advances — "Write" spins for the entire compile/verify
Icon-only and hover-revealed controls lack accessible names and focus reveal
Editing the Module field inside the dry-run modal makes "Confirm write" overwrite files the user never saw diffed
Parser silently discards macro graphs and every event graph after the first
Scalar/array JSON parses into a phantom "BP_Unknown" asset — success theater end to end
UE5 source parser reads commented-out code as live values — first match shadows the real one
View handlers re-throw hook errors into the void — unhandled rejections; clipboard copy can fail silently
Diff change cards are mouse-only — no keyboard expansion, no `aria-expanded`, and TermChip clicks toggle them by accident
Write-to-project dry-run dialog hand-rolls a modal instead of using the app's accessible `Modal` primitive
Input-panel and accent-CTA markup duplicated across both panes (and the modal)
One shared error banner leaks across tabs and is never announced to screen readers
Textareas have no programmatic label — placeholder is the only name
Aborted/timed-out builds orphan UBT's child compiler processes on Windows
PIE pause/resume mutates the shared `pieState` object in place
WebSocket auto-reconnect targets stale host/port after a settings change
Stale "live" data renders alongside a "Connect" button during reconnect
Connect button has no in-flight state — invites double-submit, gives no feedback
Sync log records outbound writes as sent even when the WebSocket dropped them
Collapsible-section header markup is duplicated ~8 times across both panels
Icon-only header buttons rely on `title` without `aria-label`
Every pause path falls through to the "completed" epilogue — paused runs are persisted and reported as completed, and the resume API is bricked
`fillPool` ignores `paused` — a user pause can launch brand-new sessions, then the pool abandons all in-flight sessions without awaiting or killing them
Checkpoint baseline anchors at HEAD, not the dirty tree — first rollback still wipes the user's pre-run uncommitted changes even in sequential mode (residual gap of 73a447a)
Cost ledger is never reset — a fresh run inherits the lifetime spend of its statePath, so the budget governor fires on day one (activated by edd8750)
An exception inside `processArea` bypasses retry accounting — the pool respawns the same area in a tight loop, spending a session per spin
The 8b7856f ISO-timestamp-default fix is inert on every existing database
Substring matching turns Scroll/Dashboard widgets into "dodge/roll" evidence and fabricates Souls-like suggestions
Clearing the prompt doesn't cancel the in-flight debounce — stale suggestions resurrect for empty input
Every failure in the Genre Evolution view is silent — errors are indistinguishable from "no data"
Suggestion disclosure headers have no aria-expanded/aria-controls, unlike the dashboard's identical pattern
Quality-score trend arrow is icon-and-hue only — no text alternative or explanation
Accent-pill buttons and section headers are copy-pasted with drifting hover/focus behavior
Loading states use two different spinners and are never announced
SessionDetail never refetches findings/events after a playtest run completes
Health trend query freezes at the first 30 completed sessions (`ORDER BY ... ASC LIMIT`)
Occurrence-history race in FingerprintsTab shows the wrong fingerprint's history
Create/triage/delete failures vanish with no user feedback (unhandled rejections)
Regression alerts label the session where the bug was last *seen* as where it was "Fixed"
Build-path "Browse" button is dead — it renders, focuses, and does nothing
Triaging one finding collapses the whole Findings Explorer into a spinner and drops scroll position
SettingTooltip content is invisible to screen readers and the trigger lies about being a button
Finding row JSX is duplicated between SessionDetail and FindingsExplorer
Session "Timeline" plays backwards — newest event first under a chronological rail
